name: Grave Lure
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>墓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>場</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ば</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>からの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>誘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いざな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc: Turn the top card of your opponent's Deck face-up, then your opponent shuffles their Deck. When your opponent draws the face-up card, immediately send it to the Graveyard.
eff: Turn the top card of your opponent's Deck face-up, then your opponent shuffles their Deck. When your opponent draws the face-up card, immediately send it to the Graveyard.

action: Allows face-up cards in Main Deck
Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
